Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-exec, dh-python, pybuild-plugin-pyproject, python3-all, python3-hatch-vcs, python3-hatchling, python3-deprecation, python3-img2pdf, python3-myst-parser, python3-pdfminer, python3-pikepdf (>= 10), python3-pil, python3-pydantic (>= 2.12.5), python3-pycparser, python3-pytest-runner, python3-rich, python3-reportlab, python3-setuptools-scm, python3-setuptools, python3-sphinx, python3-sphinx-issues, python3-sphinx-reredirects, python3-sphinx-rtd-theme, python3-sphinxcontrib-mermaid, help2man
Package-List: ocrmypdf deb graphics optional arch=all ocrmypdf-doc deb doc optional arch=all
Testsuite-Triggers: libjpeg-dev, pngquant, poppler-utils, python3-pytest, python3-pytest-cov, python3-pytest-xdist, tesseract-ocr-deu, tesseract-ocr-eng, tesseract-ocr-fra, unpaper
